headquartersRaw: London (1 Duchess Street, London, Greater London), United Kingdom
description: Fix8 is a UK-based functional beverage brand focused on naturally fermented, probiotic sparkling drinks. Founded by Freya Twigden, Fix8 produces kombucha and (from 2025) water kefir made with real fruit, science-backed probiotic cultures and added Vitamin C. Products are marketed as low-calorie, plant-based, vegan, gluten-free and with no added sugar. The brand sells canned and bottled drinks through national retailers, online direct-to-consumer, and foodservice accounts.
industry: Food & Beverage — Functional sparkling/probiotic beverages (kombucha, water kefir)
additionalContext: this brand is manufacturer of products in these categories: Flavoured Sparkling Water, Sparkling Water, Fizzy Drinks, Soft Drinks, Vinegar Drinks
archetypeAffinity: Fix8 is primarily positioned as a functional, ingredient-led beverage brand whose kombucha and upcoming water kefir products strongly appeal to health- and ingredient-conscious consumers. The brand’s core strengths—naturally fermented probiotic cultures, no added sugar, Vitamin C, plant-based and gluten-free credentials, real fruit flavours and multi-channel retail/DTC presence—drive high alignment with Wellness Seekers and Thoughtful Buyers, and provide good resonance with Experience Explorers ...
researchOverallAssessment: Fix8 is a legitimate, active UK functional beverage brand founded in 2018, specialising in kombucha and expanding into water kefir. Evidence of legitimacy includes an active official website, retailer listings (Waitrose, Morrisons, Ocado, Selfridges), trade press coverage, LinkedIn presence, and noted commercial hires. Recent activity through 2024–2025 (national supermarket listings, product launches, and distribution growth) supports an 'active' status with very high confidence. Logo extraction...

description: Double Dutch is a UK-based premium mixers and tonic brand founded by Dutch twins Joyce and Raissa de Haas. The company develops flavoured sparkling waters, tonic waters, cocktail mixers and sodas using flavour-pairing and molecular gastronomy techniques. Products are designed to enhance spirits (gin, vodka, tequila, rum, cognac) or be enjoyed standalone as non-alcoholic beverages. The brand emphasizes sustainability (B Corp / carbon neutral), flavour innovation, and services both on-trade (hotel...
industry: Beverages — premium mixers, tonics and soft drinks
additionalContext: This brand is a manufacturer of products in these categories: Flavoured Sparkling Water, Fizzy Drinks, Sparkling Water, Soft Drinks, Soft Drinks, Cocktail Mixes, Flavoured Alcoholic Beverages, Gin, Liqueurs, Fruit-Flavoured Drinks, Liquor & Spirits, Vinegar Drinks, Melons, Juice, Citrus Fruits, Dried Fruit
archetypeAffinity: Double Dutch is positioned as a premium, flavour-driven mixer and sparkling beverage brand with clear sustainability credentials (B Corp, carbon neutral) and an experiential, craft-led product philosophy. Its strengths map strongly to Quality Seekers and Experience Explorers who value artisanal production, sophisticated flavour pairing, and on-trade tasting contexts. The Conscious Consumer also aligns well thanks to verified sustainability claims, while Trend Enthusiasts and Thoughtful Buyers sh...
researchOverallAssessment: Double Dutch is a legitimate, active premium mixer and tonic brand founded in 2015 by Joyce and Raissa de Haas and headquartered in London, UK. Multiple credible sources (company website, trade press, industry profiles, retail listings) confirm the brand's products, founders, history, and international distribution. Recent press (2025–2026) documents new product launches and packaging updates, indicating ongoing growth and market activity. Logo extraction via image search failed due to rate limi...

description: SKIP is a UK-based functional soft drinks brand producing cold-pressed CBD beverages and Lion's Mane mushroom drinks. The brand emphasises plant-based ingredients, no added sugar and recyclable packaging, positioning itself around doing 'better for you, and the planet.' Products are manufactured in the UK and sold direct-to-consumer. The CBD line uses cold-pressed extraction claimed to be up to 8x more effective than standard CBD isolate, with 5mg active CBD per 250ml can. All drinks are vegan, ...
industry: Beverages — functional CBD & nootropic soft drinks
additionalContext: Product range spans two lines: CBD drinks (Peach & Ginger, Lemon & Basil, Elderflower & Mint) and Lion's Mane drinks (Blood Orange, Cloudy Apple). Sold in 12/24/48-can multipacks at £20/£38/£72. Free delivery on all UK orders. All cans fully recyclable. Plant-based ingredients. Manufactured in the UK.
archetypeAffinity: SKIP appeals most strongly to Wellness Seekers drawn to CBD's calming properties and the brand's plant-based, no-added-sugar credentials. Conscious Consumers respond to the vegan formulation, UK manufacturing and recyclable packaging. Experience Explorers are attracted to novel CBD and Lion's Mane functional ingredients as an alternative to conventional drinks. The brand's low price point and approachable flavours (peach-ginger, elderflower-mint) also resonate with Curious Tryers who want to exp...
researchOverallAssessment: SKIP is a small, early-stage UK functional drinks brand with a live DTC website, active social media presence and a coherent product range across CBD and Lion's Mane categories. Legitimacy indicators include consistent branding, real product photography, transparent ingredient lists and functional Shopify checkout. No retail listings, trade press coverage or external validation identified. Brand appears genuine but pre-scale — typical of a bootstrapped DTC startup in the functional beverages spa...

description: UNAI is a UK-crafted adaptogenic soft drinks brand producing low-sugar, all-natural lightly sparkling beverages infused with nootropics and adaptogens including Lion's Mane, Cordyceps, Reishi and Ashwagandha. Founded by childhood friends reconnected through a shared love of music and the outdoors, the brand is built around 'conscious connection' — helping consumers pause, connect and stay grounded. Products are 100% natural with no artificial flavours.
additionalContext: Two-product range: UPLIFT (Pink Grapefruit & Strawberry with Lion's Mane + Cordyceps for focus/energy) and UNWIND (Lemon & Lavender with Reishi + Ashwagandha for relaxation/sleep). Sold DTC at £29.95 per 12-pack with 15% subscription discount. Also available at RAYE Store pop-up in Notting Hill. Brand hosts experiential events (hikes, cold plunge sessions) emphasising conscious connection.
archetypeAffinity: UNAI's strongest alignment is with Wellness Seekers, who are drawn to the functional mushroom and adaptogen ingredients (Lion's Mane, Cordyceps, Reishi, Ashwagandha) and the brand's low-sugar, all-natural formulation. Experience Explorers connect with the brand's experiential events (hikes, cold plunges) and novel ingredient combinations (prickly pear, burdock root). Conscious Consumers appreciate the 100% natural, no-artificial-flavours positioning and the mindfulness-centred brand ethos. The '...
researchOverallAssessment: UNAI is a very early-stage UK adaptogenic drinks brand with a functional website, two products and minimal distribution (DTC + one pop-up location). Legitimacy indicators include a professional website with real product photography, transparent ingredient lists, nutritional information per 100ml, functional checkout and active Instagram/TikTok accounts. No retail listings, trade press coverage, regulatory certifications or external validation identified. The brand appears genuine but extremely e...

headquartersRaw: London, England, United Kingdom (registered office: 13 Hillgate Street, London W8 7SP)
description: TRIP is a functional beverage brand producing lightly sparkling, non-alcoholic drinks, powders and supplements (gummies) formulated to promote calm and wellbeing. Products are flavoured sparkling waters/soft drinks infused with magnesium, adaptogens (e.g. Lion's Mane, Ashwagandha, L-Theanine), botanicals and, historically, CBD variants. The company positions its range as an alcohol alternative and a "calm" beverage category for everyday stress relief, sells via D2C and major retailers, and also ...
industry: Beverages — Soft Drinks / Sparkling Water / Functional Beverages
additionalContext: this brand is manufacturer of products in these categories: Flavoured Sparkling Water, Sparkling Water, Fizzy Drinks, Soft Drinks, Liqueurs
archetypeAffinity: TRIP is a functional beverage brand clearly oriented toward wellness-focused and trend-driven consumers: its core positioning as a 'calm' alcohol alternative, formulations containing adaptogens and magnesium, and product expansion into powders and gummies make it an excellent fit for Wellness Seekers and Trend Enthusiasts. The brand also attracts Quality Seekers and Experience Explorers who appreciate curated ingredient blends and sensory variety, and performs well with On-the-Go and Impulse sho...
researchOverallAssessment: TRIP is a legitimate, active functional beverage brand founded in 2019 and headquartered in London, UK. Evidence from the brand's official site, press releases (PR Newswire), industry coverage (BeverageDaily), business databases (PitchBook, Tracxn) and retail distribution announcements supports high confidence in the brand's authenticity and market activity. The company has rapidly scaled through D2C and major retail partnerships, launched functional product lines (magnesium/adaptogen drinks, gu...

description: DASH refers to two distinct, legitimate beverage and seasoning brands that share the name. 1) Dash (formerly Mrs. Dash) is a long-standing U.S. salt-free seasoning line of herb-and-spice blends and mixes (blends like Original, Lemon Pepper, Taco Seasoning, grilling blends), marketed to consumers seeking bold flavor without added sodium; the line emphasizes heart-healthy, low-sodium eating and is marketed by B&G Foods. 2) Dash Water (DASH) is a UK-founded sparkling spring water / flavoured sparkl...
industry: Food & Beverage (seasonings, spices, and flavored sparkling water)
additionalContext: this brand is manufacturer of products in these categories: Salt, Flavoured Sparkling Water, Sparkling Water, Seasonings & Spices, Herbs & Spices
archetypeAffinity: DASH encompasses two distinct food & beverage businesses — Mrs. Dash (salt-free seasoning line, mainstream U.S. pantry brand owned by B&G Foods) and Dash Water (UK-founded sparkling spring water using real and surplus fruit with a sustainability/food-waste story). Taken together, the portfolio most strongly aligns with wellness-oriented and health-conscious consumers because Mrs. Dash’s low-sodium, flavour-forward seasoning and Dash Water’s zero-calorie, unsweetened fruit-infused sparkling water...
researchOverallAssessment: DASH is a real, active market name used by at least two separate food & beverage businesses: Dash (formerly Mrs. Dash) is an established U.S. salt-free seasoning brand with documented history since the early 1980s (commercially introduced 1983) and currently marketed by B&G Foods; Dash Water is a UK-founded flavored sparkling water brand launched within the last several years focused on using real/wonky fruit and sustainability, with rapid retail growth in the UK. Both brands have active web pro...

headquartersRaw: Manchester, England, United Kingdom (primary addresses reported: 9 Great Ancoats Street, Manchester M4 5AD; Department Bonded Warehouse, 18 Lower Byrom Street, Manchester M3 4AP)
description: Hip Pop is a UK-based beverage brand that produces lightly sparkling, fruit-flavoured drinks (kombucha-style and sodas) formulated with real fruit, live cultures and no artificial sweeteners. Launched by founders Emma Thackray and Kenny Goodman, Hip Pop positions itself in the functional/‘better-for-you’ soft drinks space with products including fruit-flavoured sodas, kombucha variants and CBD kombucha. The brand emphasises gut-friendly benefits, natural ingredients, bold packaging and retail ex...
industry: Food & Beverage (functional soft drinks / non-alcoholic beverages)
additionalContext: this brand is manufacturer of products in these categories: Fruit-Flavoured Drinks, Fizzy Drinks, Flavoured Sparkling Water, Vinegar Drinks, Sparkling Water
archetypeAffinity: Hip Pop is positioned primarily as a functional, better-for-you beverage brand with strong appeal to wellness-oriented and trend-driven consumers. Its product set—kombucha-style drinks, live cultures, real fruit and no artificial sweeteners—aligns exceptionally well with Wellness Seekers and strongly with Trend Enthusiasts and Thoughtful Buyers who value ingredient transparency. The brand’s bold packaging and unique variants create discovery and impulse potential, making it a reasonable fit for ...
researchOverallAssessment: Hip Pop is a legitimate, active UK-based functional soft drinks brand founded in 2019 and headquartered in Manchester. Evidence from the company's own website, multiple independent industry publications (Just-Drinks, FoodBev, Food & Drink Technology), LinkedIn activity and supermarket listings confirms authenticity and current market activity. The brand completed a notable rebrand in 2025, launched new flavours and expanded retail distribution (including Tesco Extra in March 2026) while particip...

description: Agua de Madre is a London-based producer of fermented beverages, primarily craft-brewed water kefir. The brand makes organic, vegan, naturally sparkling, low-sugar drinks packed with live probiotic cultures (water kefir), plus a Remedio range (fermented ginger/fruit infusions) and probiotic culture shots. Founded by Nicola Hart (and co-founder Samantha Clark), the company positions itself as a mindful/functional drinks brand offering alcohol-alternative, gut-health-focused products brewed in sma...
additionalContext: this brand is manufacturer of products in these categories: Flavoured Sparkling Water, Sparkling Water, Fizzy Drinks, Vinegar Drinks, Drinks and Beverages
archetypeAffinity: Agua de Madre is positioned as a mindful, small-batch functional beverage brand that strongly appeals to consumers who prioritise sustainability, organic/vegan credentials and gut-health benefits. The brand’s core strengths—live probiotic water kefir, low-sugar formulation, ethical sourcing, plastic-free packaging claims and community giving—make it an exceptional fit for Conscious Consumers and Wellness Seekers, and a very good fit for Experience Explorers and Quality Seekers who value artisana...
researchOverallAssessment: Agua de Madre is an active, legitimate UK-based functional drinks brand (founded 2017) focused on fermented water kefir and related probiotic products. Multiple independent business databases (PitchBook, Crunchbase, Tracxn), trade press (The Grocer, Bar Magazine), consumer press (Foodism), and the brand's own web and LinkedIn presence corroborate its existence, product range, B Corp certification, recent product launches (cans, Remedio flavours), and a live fundraising effort. No credible indica...

description: Dalston's is a beverage company known for producing 'Soda With Soul,' which is full-flavor fizz made with real fruit and no added sugar or artificial sweeteners. The brand emphasizes sustainability, using recycled aluminum cans that are 100% recyclable. It was created by chefs in an East London nightclub.
archetypeAffinity: Dalston's positions itself at the intersection of craft flavour, clean ingredients and sustainability: a chef-origin story, real fruit flavours, and recyclable aluminium cans define the brand. This makes it an exceptional match for Conscious Consumers and a strong fit for Wellness Seekers who value no added sugar and natural ingredients. The brand's artisanal provenance and sensory focus also attract Experience Explorers and Trend Enthusiasts, while Quality Seekers see value in the premium taste...
researchOverallAssessment: Dalston's is a legitimate and active brand known for its commitment to quality and sustainability in the beverage industry. With a strong online presence, active social media engagement, and positive community involvement, the brand is well-positioned in the market.
